pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates CSV at this exact path
Task description and export_result.sh both reference this path
Task description specifies 'donors who have given $1,000 or more'
Verified as official brand designation in LibreOffice/OpenOffice mailing labels dialog. See https://ask.libreoffice.org/t/where-are-mailing-label-templates-to-use-in-writer/36906
Avery 5160 is a real product. Official specs: 1" × 2-5/8", 30 labels per sheet (3 columns × 10 rows). https://www.avery.com/products/labels/5160
Setup script generates 50 donors with 40% probability of high-value (>= $1000). Expected count: 50 × 0.40 = 20. Verified with 10 trial runs: range 18-23, average 21.1

privileged_info_summary: The task creates mailing labels using Apache OpenOffice Writer with Avery Label 5160 template (3 columns, 10 rows, 1" × 2-5/8" per label). The input CSV contains 50 donor records generated synthetically with ~40% having donations >= $1,000 (expected ~20 high-value donors). The output must filter to show only donors with TotalDonation >= $1,000 and save as golden_circle_labels.odt.
